text: Standing here, I feel a distinct blend of curiosity and anticipation. The glass-walled room with neon light suggests innovation and potential, inviting me into a world of creation. Inside, the vivid wall displays invoke thoughts of both art and science—two pillars of inquiry. The text and images celebrate research and development, reminding me that progress is born from imagination and thoughtful experimentation. Surrounded by the instruments and records of inventive minds, I feel almost childlike excitement and a sense that I too am part of this unfolding exploration.
